hp_potion_1.name: Dewfall Tonic
hp_potion_1.description: A modest vial of dew distilled from forest leaves. Restores a lick of vitality.

hp_potion_2.name: Glade Salve Vial
hp_potion_2.description: Balmed with sap and honey; travelers swear by its steadying warmth.

hp_large.name: Elixir of Verdant Heart
hp_large.description: Bottled heartwood essence; a boon for the gravely wounded.

mp_potion_1.name: Scholar's Draught
mp_potion_1.description: A chalk-sweet draught; aids in gathering stray sigils of power.

mp_potion_2.name: Lunaris Tonic
mp_potion_2.description: Drawn from moon-scented mushrooms; used by apprentice mages.

antidote_basic.name: Thicket Antidote
antidote_basic.description: A paste brewed from moss and nettle—pulls sting from the blood.

stamina_tonic.name: Runner's Cordial
stamina_tonic.description: Sipped before a chase; steadies the legs and clears the head.

strength_brew.name: Captains' Ale (Embolden)
strength_brew.description: A warming draft that floods the arm with sudden might.

dex_elixir.name: Starlit Tincture
dex_elixir.description: A shimmering sip that makes the hand deft for a time.

food_ration.name: Trailman's Ration
food_ration.description: Dried meat and bread—plain, comforting, sustaining.

campfire_stew.name: Warden's Stew
campfire_stew.description: A thick, hearty stew that bolsters the weary heart.

throwing_bomb.name: Sporebomb
throwing_bomb.description: When burst, it clouds sight with numbing spores.

regen_potion.name: Sap of Renewal
regen_potion.description: A dripping sap that mends slowly over time.

resist_elixir.name: Wardkeeper's Vial
resist_elixir.description: Hums faintly; pushes away the keen edges of harm.

antidote_strong.name: Panacea Root Paste
antidote_strong.description: A thick paste that quiets the worst venoms.

elixir_of_focus.name: Scribe's Focus
elixir_of_focus.description: A scholar's secret: sharp as a quill.

heroic_potion.name: Champion's Draught
heroic_potion.description: A rare tonic gifted to those who stand against fate.

mythic_amber.name: Amber of the Old World
mythic_amber.description: Found only in whispered legends; restores life like a dawn.

smoke_pellet.name: Whisper-Cloud Pellet
smoke_pellet.description: A quick, choking cloud that covers flight and trickery.

elixir_luck.name: Luck-Blessed Cordial
elixir_luck.description: A whispered toast to fortune; coins seem to fall kinder.

volatile_brew.name: Volatile Brew
volatile_brew.description: A bubbling, unstable mixture. Grants immense power at a cost to safety.

shadow_veil.name: Shadow Veil
shadow_veil.description: A liquid that seems to absorb light, making the drinker hard to track.
